ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, drone, robot) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "sensor_types" TEXT /* Types of sensors installed on the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner or responsible entity for the vehicle */,
  "operational_area" TEXT /* Area where the vehicle is primarily operated (e.g., urban, warehouse) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date of maintenance for the vehicle */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Next date when maintenance is due */,
  "total_mileage" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., GPS, LiDAR, IMU) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "calibration_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of sensor calibration */,
  "last_calibration_by" TEXT /* User who last calibrated the sensor */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "sensor_lifetime" REAL /* Expected lifetime of the sensor in hours or cycles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_installations" (
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor installation */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "installation_location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor was installed (e.g., front, rear, top) */,
  "installation_by" TEXT /* User who performed the installation */,
  "installation_method" TEXT /* Method used for installation */,
  "installation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the installation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_installations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_installations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle from which the data was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor from which the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "x_position" REAL /* X position of the vehicle */,
  "y_position" REAL /* Y position of the vehicle */,
  "position" REAL /* Position of the vehicle (calculated from x and y) */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the vehicle */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the vehicle */,
  "jerk" REAL /* Jerk of the vehicle */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading of the vehicle */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag to indicate any issues with the data quality */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_compression_type" TEXT /* Type of compression used (e.g., gzip, zip) */,
  "file_source" TEXT /* Source of the file (e.g., sensor, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES motion_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the version change */,
  "version_rollback_flag" TEXT /* Flag to indicate if the version can be rolled back */,
  "version_rollback_to" INTEGER /* Version number to which it can be rolled back */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES motion_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion data */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (0-100) of the data */,
  "quality_issues" TEXT /* Issues found during quality checks */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "quality_checked_by" TEXT /* User who performed the quality check */,
  "quality_source" TEXT /* Source of the quality check (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "quality_tool_used" TEXT /* Tool or method used for the quality check */,
  "quality_issues_resolved" TEXT /* Flag to indicate if the issues have been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES motion_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES motion_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "last_login_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "role_modules" TEXT /* Modules the role has access to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, diagnostics) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion data used in the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data used in the report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, file) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data used in the report */,
  "data_version_used" INTEGER /* Version of the data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., add, edit, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Time the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action (e.g., data ID, report ID) */,
  "action_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_location" TEXT /* Location from which the action was performed */,
  "action_device" TEXT /* Device used for the action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
